title: Crispy Sweet Korean Onion Salad
description: A bright, crunchy salad featuring sweet-tart marinated onions, Korean spices, and a touch of sesame, perfect as a show‑off starter or side.

ingredients.name: honey
ingredients.amount: 1 tsp (optional, reduce to ½ tsp for stricter control)

instructions: In a small bowl whisk together rice vinegar, soy sauce, sesame oil, honey, grated ginger, and minced garlic until well blended.
Add the gochugaru and gochujang to the sauce and stir until the spices dissolve.
Place the sliced onion cubes in a shallow dish and pour the sauce over them.
Toss gently to coat all onions, then cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, sprinkle toasted sesame seeds and sliced green onions over the salad and give it a final toss.
Serve chilled or at room temperature as a crispy, sweet accompaniment to your favorite Korean meal.
